General.Name: Emperor Entertainment Hotel Ltd
General.Description: Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited, an investment holding company, provides hospitality services in Macau and Hong Kong. It operates hotels under the Grand Emperor Hotel, Inn Hotel, and The Emperor Hotel, as well as several blocks of leasing apartments under "The Unit". The company also provides hotel and catering services; management services for hotels and leasing apartments; and leases apartments. In addition, it leases investment properties. The company was formerly known as Emperor (China Concept) Investments Ltd. and changed its name to Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited in January 2005. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited is a subsidiary of Emperor Entertainment Hotel Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Emperor Group Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong

1.Name: Mr. Ching Loong  Yeung J.P.
